title: Review: Rust bigot API idiomaticity pass
notes:
Maintainer risk: MEDIUM — the Id inconsistency in response types is the main concern; it will generate subtle bugs and confusion as the TUI crate grows. The stringly-typed sort/filter params are a lower-frequency footgun but will be hit.
Confidence: 95% no missed bug. These are API shape issues, not logic bugs. The only miss risk: a response type field that should be Id but gets an empty string from a buggy server — currently silently propagates, not caught at parse time.
